name: Kotak Myntra Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 7.5% cashback on all Myntra purchases (capped at ₹750/month)
5% cashback on all other online shopping

welcomeBenefits.condition: On card activation and first transaction

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Renewal fee waiver for the next year

additionalBenefits: Zero joining fee — first year completely free
7.5% cashback on Myntra is among the highest co-brand rates
5% on all online shopping beyond Myntra
Exclusive Myntra insider benefits and early sale access
pros: Zero joining fee with free first year makes it risk-free to try
7.5% cashback on Myntra is one of the highest co-brand rates available
5% cashback on all online shopping is competitive beyond just Myntra
₹500 Myntra welcome voucher offsets the renewal fee
Low renewal fee of ₹499 with achievable ₹1 lakh waiver threshold
cons: Myntra cashback capped at ₹750 per month limits high spenders
No airport lounge access of any kind
Only 1% cashback on offline transactions is below average

idealFor: Frequent Myntra shoppers looking to maximize savings on fashion and lifestyle purchases
Online shoppers who want a solid 5% cashback across e-commerce platforms
Budget-conscious users who want a no-joining-fee card with good online rewards

faqs.question: Is the first year free for the Kotak Myntra card?
faqs.answer: Yes, the joining fee is ₹0 and the first year annual fee is also ₹0. The renewal fee of ₹499 applies from the second year onwards, which can be waived by spending ₹1,00,000 in the previous year.

faqs.question: How does the 7.5% Myntra cashback work?
faqs.answer: You earn 7.5% cashback on all purchases made on Myntra, capped at ₹750 per month. This means spends up to ₹10,000 per month on Myntra are rewarded at the full 7.5% rate.

faqs.question: Does the 5% online cashback apply to all e-commerce sites?
faqs.answer: Yes, the 5% cashback applies to all online merchants beyond Myntra, including Amazon, Flipkart, and other e-commerce platforms. Wallet loading and rent payments are excluded.

faqs.question: Can I use this card for Myntra sales like EORS?
faqs.answer: Yes, the 7.5% cashback applies during Myntra sales events as well, subject to the ₹750 monthly cap. You may also get exclusive early access to certain Myntra sales.
